Schema.description: Issued certificates for module and course completion. One record per learner per entity. Idempotent — re-completion does not overwrite an existing certificate.
Schema.condition: CloudFormation Condition: IsShadowStage (only provisioned when stage=shadow)

attributes.certId: UUID v4 — globally unique certificate identifier; also the GSI partition key for public verification lookup
attributes.learnerId: Cognito sub of the learner who earned the certificate
attributes.entitySlug: Slug of the module or course for which the certificate was issued
attributes.issuedAt: ISO 8601 timestamp when the certificate was first issued
attributes.evidenceSummary: Map: {<taskSlug>: <status>} snapshot at time of issuance — immutable evidence of completion state

indexes.certId-index: GSI on certId (HASH only, projection ALL) — used by GET /shadow/certificate/:certId for public verification without PII exposure
